scripts.test:ui: cross-env TEST_MODE=UI docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down --remove-orphans && cross-env TEST_MODE=UI docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build
scripts.test:security: cross-env TEST_MODE=SECURITY docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down --remove-orphans && cross-env TEST_MODE=SECURITY docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build
scripts.test:api: cross-env TEST_MODE=API docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down --remove-orphans && cross-env TEST_MODE=API docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build
